stemHtml: A four engined-jet transport aircraft experiences an engine failure shortly after departure and the pilot decides to return to its departure aerodrome. Which of the following safety measures could be considered?

options.a: Begin dumping fuel, if the aircraft is equipped with a fuel jettison system, to reduce weight and balance the aircraft.
options.b: Switch all fuel pumps on to avoid fuel starvation to any remaining three engines.
options.c: Open the cross feed valve, even if the fuel indications do not require it.
options.d: Turn all fuel pumps off and turn them back on before landing.
